channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 6.8%.

item.title: Bluesky · @pippacrerar.bsky.social: 💥 We're also hearing that Wes Streeting is preparing to quit as health secretary and could mount formal challenge for leadership as early as tomorrow - as per @breeallegretti.bsky.social & @patrickmaguire.bsky.social...
item.description: 💥 We're also hearing that Wes Streeting is preparing to quit as health secretary and could mount formal challenge for leadership as early as tomorrow - as per @breeallegretti.bsky.social & @patrickmaguire.bsky.social...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: King’s Speech 2026: Key points from Charles’ address amid Starmer leadership crisis

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Why Labour’s anti-Burnham argument doesn’t work
item.description: Why Labour’s anti-Burnham argument doesn’t work

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer-Streeting latest: Health minister ‘set to resign’ and spark leadership contest after King’s Speech
item.description: Starmer-Streeting latest: Health minister ‘set to resign’ and spark leadership contest after King’s Speech

item.title: FT UK Politics: Downing Street braced for Streeting leadership challenge
item.description: Downing Street braced for Streeting leadership challenge

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting plans to resign and mount leadership challenge, allies say - The Guardian

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Wes Streeting: From the East End to Westminster – and now set for No 10?
item.description: Wes Streeting: From the East End to Westminster – and now set for No 10?

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Right-wing politician threatens to sue Starmer over ban on entering UK for Tommy Robinson march
item.description: Right-wing politician threatens to sue Starmer over ban on entering UK for Tommy Robinson march

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Roy Jenkins: “I vacillated about going against Harold Wilson as a cautionary tale.” Wes Streeting: “At last, we will recreate the legendary Roy Jenkins leadership tilt from the iconic book ‘For the love of god do not ...
item.description: Roy Jenkins: “I vacillated about going against Harold Wilson as a cautionary tale.” Wes Streeting: “At last, we will recreate the legendary Roy Jenkins leadership tilt from the iconic book ‘For the love of god do not ...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: What to expect from the King’s Speech as Starmer fights for survival
item.description: What to expect from the King’s Speech as Starmer fights for survival
